questions.question: What is the maximum deduction under section 80C?
questions.explanation: As per Income Tax Act, maximum deduction under 80C is ₹1,50,000.

questions.question: Mr A earns ₹12,00,000 under new tax regime. What is rebate under section 87A?
questions.explanation: Under new regime, rebate up to ₹60,000 is allowed if income ≤ ₹12 lakh.

questions.question: What is holding period for LTCG in listed shares?
questions.explanation: Listed shares become long-term after 12 months.

questions.question: Mr B sold listed shares after 10 months. What is tax treatment?
questions.explanation: Holding <12 months → STCG taxed under section 111A @20%.

questions.question: What is maximum deduction under section 80D for senior citizen?
questions.explanation: Senior citizens get deduction up to ₹50,000 under section 80D.

questions.question: Mr C has LTCG of ₹1,40,000 from listed shares. What is taxable amount?
questions.explanation: ₹1.25 lakh is exempt under section 112A, so remaining ₹15,000 taxable.

questions.question: What is standard deduction under new tax regime?
questions.explanation: Standard deduction under new regime is ₹75,000.

questions.question: What is tax rate for lottery winnings?
Gift received ₹60,000 from friend. Tax treatment?
questions.explanation: If gift exceeds ₹50,000, entire amount becomes taxable.
